zh.Anta, Vila Real, Portugal: 葡萄牙比拉 雷亞爾安踏
zh.lifeSummary: 當Fernão Mendes de Bragança於大約1095年出生在葡萄牙布拉甘薩布拉甘薩時，他的父親Mendo Fernandes de Bragança24歲，母親Sancha Viegas de Baião36歲。他和Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal至少有2個兒子。他去世於1160年在葡萄牙享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fernão Mendes de Bragança于大约1095年出生在葡萄牙布拉甘薩布拉甘薩时，他的父亲Mendo Fernandes de Bragança24岁，母亲Sancha Viegas de Baião36岁。他和Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal至少有2个儿子。他去世于1160年在葡萄牙享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mendes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Mario, Pedro, Alberto, Sergio, Armando, Cesar, Domingos, Francisco, Luis.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Agostinho, Amadeu, Armanda, Guilherme, Henrique, Sebastiao, Valentim.
Portuguese and Galician: patronymic from the personal name Mendo, a shortened form of Menendo (see Menendez ).

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Iberian surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Mendez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Jesus, Francisco, Pedro, Miguel, Raul, Jorge, Rafael.  Portuguese Ligia, Godofredo, Ilidio, Paulo, Serafim.
Galician (Méndez): patronymic from the personal name Mendo (see Mendes , of which this is the Galician equivalent).

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Iberian surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Mandes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Pedro, Armando, Joaquin, Jose Inez, Tomasa.
Altered form of Portuguese   Mendes  .

variants.name: Mendy
meanings: West African (Guinea Bissau, Senegal, and the Gambia): name found among the Manjak people, thought to be a shortened and altered form of Portuguese   Mendes  .
English (Buckinghamshire): variant of Menday, itself a variant of Mundy .

variants.name: Menendez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Juan, Ramon, Angel, Jorge, Fernando, Francisco, Rafael, Mario.  Portuguese Marcio.

Spanish (Menéndez): patronymic from the medieval personal name Men(d)endo, a hypercorrected form of the Visigothic personal name Hermenegild, composed of the elements ermen, irmen ‘whole, entire’ + gild ‘tribute’. This personal name was borne by a 6th-century member of the Visigothic royal house, who was converted from Arianism to the Catholic faith and became an enormously popular saint, as a result of which the personal name was very common in Spain in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bragança
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Portuguese Bragança: habitational name from the city of Bragança in northern Portugal. This form of the surname is most common in India, as a result of former Portuguese colonization of the western coast of this country, and in the Philippines.

History: Braganza is an Anglicized form of the name of the royal house Bragança whose members occupied the throne of Portugal from 1640 to 1910. Before that, they exercised enormous power in the Iberian peninsula as Dukes of Braganza from 1442 onward.

nameMeanings.name: Fernão
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of various places called Fernau, Fernow, or Viernau.

variants.name: Fearnow
meanings: Americanized form of German Fernau or of Virnau (also Viernow), a habitational name from Viernau in Thuringia.

historicEvents.description: Afonso inherits the County of Portugal, a province of Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Fernão Mendes de Bragança was born about 1095, in Bragança, Bragança, Portugal, his father, Mendo Fernandes de Bragança, was 24 and his mother, Sancha Viegas de Baião, was 36. He had at least 2 sons with Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal. He died in 1160, in Portugal, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fernão Mendes de Bragança est né environ 1095, à Bragança, Bragança, Portugal, son père, Mendo Fernandes de Bragança, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Sancha Viegas de Baião, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal. Il est décédé en 1160, à Portugal, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fernão Mendes de Bragança um 1095 in Bragança, Bragança, Portugal geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mendo Fernandes de Bragança 24 und seine Mutter Sancha Viegas de Baião 36. Er hatte mit Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1160 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Portugal.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Fernão Mendes de Bragança è nato il circa 1095 nel Bragança, Bragança, Portogallo, il suo padre, Mendo Fernandes de Bragança, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Sancha Viegas de Baião, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal. Morì nel 1160, nel Portogallo, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Fernão Mendes de Bragançaが約1095年にポルトガルブラガンcアブラガンcアで生まれた時，父Mendo Fernandes de Bragançaは24歳，母Sancha Viegas de Baiãoは36歳であった。彼はSancha Henriques Infanta de Portugalとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1160年にポルトガルで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Fernão Mendes de Bragança(이)가 대략 1095년 포르투갈 브라건c아 브라건c아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mendo Fernandes de Bragança(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Sancha Viegas de Baião(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1160년 포르투갈에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fernão Mendes de Bragança nasceu aproximadamente 1095, em Bragança, Bragança, Portugal, seu pai, Mendo Fernandes de Bragança, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Sancha Viegas de Baião, tinha 36 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal. Ele faleceu em 1160, em Portugal, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fernão Mendes de Bragança родился около 1095 г. в местности браганcа, браганcа, Португалия, его отцу по имени Mendo Fernandes de Bragança было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Sancha Viegas de Baião, 36. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal. Он умер в 1160 г. в местности Португалия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Fernão Mendes de Bragança nació aproximadamente 1095, en Bragança, Bragança, Portugal, su papá, Mendo Fernandes de Bragança, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Sancha Viegas de Baião, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Sancha Henriques Infanta de Portugal. Murió en 1160, en Portugal, a la edad de 66 años.
